ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "trip_date" TEXT /* Date of the trip */,
  "commuter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commuter */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transportation mode */,
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purpose */,
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the origin */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trip */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trip */,
  "travel_time" INTEGER /* Travel time in minutes */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled in miles */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle used (if applicable) */,
  "transit_line" TEXT /* Specific transit line used (if applicable) */,
  "toll_amount" REAL /* Toll amount paid (if applicable) */,
  "parking_location" TEXT /* Parking location (if applicable) */,
  "parking_cost" REAL /* Parking cost (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_commuter_id FOREIGN KEY ("commuter_id") REFERENCES commuters ("commuter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_purpose_id FOREIGN KEY ("purpose_id") REFERENCES purposes ("purpose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES destinations ("destination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES modes ("mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_origin_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_id") REFERENCES origins ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commuters" (
  "commuter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commuter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the commuter */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the commuter */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the commuter */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the commuter */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the commuter */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Income of the commuter */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the commuter */,
  "residence_type" TEXT /* Type of residence */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Number of people in the commuter's household */,
  "vehicle_count" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles owned by the commuter */,
  "preferred_transport_mode" TEXT /* Preferred mode of transportation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commuter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the mode (e.g., driving, walking, cycling, public transportation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mode */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the mode is public transportation */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the mode in miles per hour */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the mode (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purposes" (
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purpose */,
  "purpose_name" TEXT /* Name of the purpose (e.g., work, school, leisure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the purpose */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the purpose is recurring */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the purpose (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "origins" (
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each origin */,
  "origin_name" TEXT /* Name of the origin */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the origin */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the origin */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the origin */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the origin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "destinations" (
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each destination */,
  "destination_name" TEXT /* Name of the destination */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the destination */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the destination */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the destination */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the destination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., car, bus, bike) */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "commuter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commuter */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the survey */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the commuter */,
  "suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions for improvement */,
  "transport_mode" TEXT /* Transport mode used */,
  "satisfaction_rating" INTEGER /* Satisfaction rating (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_commuter_id FOREIGN KEY ("commuter_id") REFERENCES commuters ("commuter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., traffic, weather) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor */,
  "data_collected" TEXT /* Data collected by the sensor */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., weather, traffic) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)
